capability_declaration.evidence: Part 7 Logical Node (LN) classes; SCL configuration files defining device data models and supported services.
capability_declaration.rationale: The standard explicitly defines device capabilities through standardized LN classes and structured data objects, enabling precise functional discovery by autonomous agents prior to operation.

bounded_authority.evidence: Part 7-2 Service Access Control (SAC); PermissionLevel attributes; General Interlock mechanisms on control services.
bounded_authority.rationale: Defines permissions, interlocks, and access controls that bound operational authority. However, it lacks explicit AI-agent-specific scopes, time-bound authorizations, or standardized revocation workflows for autonomous entities.

decision_auditability.evidence: Part 7 Buffered (BRCB) & Unbuffered Reporting Control Blocks; Sequence of Events recording services.
decision_auditability.rationale: Provides robust event reporting and command logging infrastructure essential for tracking operations. Yet it does not explicitly mandate agentic decision attribution or compliance-focused audit trail structures for autonomous control loops.

data_governance.rationale: Strictly an industrial communication standard for power automation; contains no provisions regarding data ownership, user consent mechanisms, retention policies, or privacy governance frameworks.
